title: PlayerView/InvView
description: allows you to inspect player's inventories, enderchest, health, etc in an intuitive GUI
body:
# PlayerView

A lightweight client-side mod that allows you to inspect other players in an intuitive and clean GUI.

## ✨ Features

* 👤 View other players' **inventory**
* 🛡️ See **armor** and **offhand** items
* ❤️ Display **health**
* 🍗 Check **hunger level**
* ⭐ View **XP level**
* 📦 Open and inspect **ender chest**
* 🔍 Built-in **player list with search**
* 🎯 Highlight hovered players in the world

## 🎮 Usage

* Press **G** or to open the player list (keybinds can be configured in the settings)
* Click on a player to view their inventory
* Hover over players to make them glow in the world
* Use the GUI buttons to navigate between inventory and ender chest

## ⚠️ Disclaimer

* This mod works completely clientside and uses the `/data` command to retrieve player data
* You may need appropriate **permissions (e.g. operator)** on servers
* the hover-to-glow-feature may be considered as cheat
